heading: Vouchering Senate office charges
label: 6509 Vouchering Senate office charges
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 68–8 of this titleSection is from the Congressional Operations Appropriations Act, 1994, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 1994.

children.text: such charges are paid on behalf of the office incurring such expenses by such Senate support office; or
such charges are payable to such Senate support office for goods or services provided by such office to the office incurring such expenses.

children.heading: Payment charged to official funds
children.label: b Payment charged to official funds
children.text: Payments under this section shall be charged to the official funds of the office on whose behalf the expenses were paid, or which received the goods or services for which payment is required.

children.heading: Certification
children.label: c Certification
children.text: Any voucher submitted by a Senate support office pursuant to this section shall be accompanied by a certification from such office of the amount and that such purchases were of the nature that they could be charged to the official funds of the office on whose behalf charges were paid, or to which goods or services were provided.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: d Regulations
children.text: Vouchers under this section shall be submitted and paid subject to such regulations as may be promulgated by the Committee on Rules and Administration.
